en: If your company is required to comply with ZUS Employer Social Insurance, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form.
Poland Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment
All Polish employers must register with the Social Insurance Institution (ZUS) to contribute to national pension, health, and accident insurance schemes.
Is your company required to comply with ZUS Employer Social Insurance and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reasons your company is exempt from complying with ZUS Employer Social Insurance.
The company's employees are entirely contracted through another entity to perform the work for you.
The company has foreign employee(s) working in Poland that are covered by the home country's scheme and are prepared to provide a copy of the A1 certificate(s) upon request.
